products.name: Haley 110
products.description_text: A popular multi-purpose futon engineered for a medium-firm feel, with generous amounts of highly-resilient foam and polyester. Characteristics		Comfort Level - A not too soft, not too firm feel 			Durability - 10-12+ years, designed to resist changes in support for years			Thickness - A TRUE 8" (14" of overstuffed goods compressed to perform inside an 8" border)			Weight - Per full size, 40 pounds			Home Style Use - Sofa and Bed			Frame Recommendations - Can be used on a bi-fold frame or a platform bed style frame	 Construction		A 100% polyester fabric that breathes, stays cool and comfortable, and repels moisture.			9" of 2-pound density foam provides the ability to keep the mattress looking and feeling great.			The flame-retardant rayon wrap and polyester protects the mattress and gives a clean, finished look.			Machine tufting reduces the thickness of the mattress to lock in its good look and feel.			The tape edge construction ensures a proper fit and finish of the mattress cover. Bench Built: Hand-made quality assures uniformity and quality control on each futon. Box Edges:  For a TRUE reading of thickness. Overstuffed:  Generous amounts (approx. 14") of different combinations of highly resilient foam and fiber that create an "inside out" force against the mattress ticking that is necessary for proper and comfortable support, whether sitting or sleeping. Tape Edge Closure:  Expert mattress tailoring operation that seals the comfort inside the mattress ensures proper placement of materials in the cover and reinforces the edges to present a clean tailored look instead of a "haphazardly stuffed look." Compression Lace Tufting: This customized process alone will differentiate an Otis futon from any other! CLT serves to compress, strengthen, and control the overstuffed cushioning materials. Our "buttonless" tufting process forces the foam, fibers, springs, and mattress fabric to work together to create a supportive synergy that produces a comfort level unique to each mattress… bottom line, your mattress will feel as supportive as it did on the first day.
products.description_html:
A popular multi-purpose futon engineered for a medium-firm feel, with generous amounts of highly-resilient foam and polyester.

 

Characteristics

Comfort Level - A not too soft, not too firm feel

Durability - 10-12+ years, designed to resist changes in support for years

Thickness - A TRUE 8" (14" of overstuffed goods compressed to perform inside an 8" border)

Weight - Per full size, 40 pounds

Home Style Use - Sofa and Bed

Frame Recommendations - Can be used on a bi-fold frame or a platform bed style frame

 

Construction

A 100% polyester fabric that breathes, stays cool and comfortable, and repels moisture.

9" of 2-pound density foam provides the ability to keep the mattress looking and feeling great.

The flame-retardant rayon wrap and polyester protects the mattress and gives a clean, finished look.

Machine tufting reduces the thickness of the mattress to lock in its good look and feel.

The tape edge construction ensures a proper fit and finish of the mattress cover.

 

Bench Built: Hand-made quality assures uniformity and quality control on each futon.

 

Box Edges: For a TRUE reading of thickness.

 

Overstuffed: Generous amounts (approx. 14") of different combinations of highly resilient foam and fiber that create an "inside out" force against the mattress ticking that is necessary for proper and comfortable support, whether sitting or sleeping.

 

Tape Edge Closure: Expert mattress tailoring operation that seals the comfort inside the mattress ensures proper placement of materials in the cover and reinforces the edges to present a clean tailored look instead of a "haphazardly stuffed look."

 

Compression Lace Tufting: This customized process alone will differentiate an Otis futon from any other! CLT serves to compress, strengthen, and control the overstuffed cushioning materials. Our "buttonless" tufting process forces the foam, fibers, springs, and mattress fabric to work together to create a supportive synergy that produces a comfort level unique to each mattress… bottom line, your mattress will feel as supportive as it did on the first day.

products.name: Moonshadow
products.description_text: Our most popular ultra-premium all-foam constructed futon that is soft, plush, and cushy, yet is very supportive. Characteristics:		Comfort Level - An elite plush, soft feel			Durability - 10-12+ years, designed for everyday use			Thickness - A TRUE 8" (14" of overstuffed goods compressed to fit inside an 8" border)			Weight - Per full size, 45 pounds			Home Style Use - Sofa and Bed (please note if primary purpose is for a bed)			Frame Recommendations - Can be used on a bi-fold frame or a platform bed style frame	 Construction:1. A 100% polyester fabric that breathes, stays cool and comfortable, and repels moisture.2. 10" of high quality 2-pound density convoluted and flat foam provides the soft cushy feel of Otis Bed’s most popular futon mattress.3. The flame-retardant rayon wrap protects the mattress and gives a clean finished look.4. Machine tufting reduces the thickness of the mattress to lock in its good look and feel.5. The tape edge construction ensures a proper fit and finish of the mattress cover. Bench Built: Hand-made quality assures uniformity and quality control on each futon.Box Edges: For a TRUE reading of thickness.Overstuffed: Generous amounts (approx. 14") of different combinations of highly resilient foam and fiber that create an "inside out" force against the mattress ticking that is necessary for proper and comfortable support, whether sitting or sleeping.Tape Edge Closure: Expert mattress tailoring operation that seals the comfort inside the mattress ensures proper placement of materials in the cover and reinforces the edges to present a clean tailored look instead of a "haphazardly stuffed look."Compression Lace Tufting: This customized process alone will differentiate an Otis futon from any other! CLT serves to compress, strengthen, and control the overstuffed cushioning materials. The "buttonless" tufting process forces the foam, fibers, springs, and mattress fabric to work together to create a supportive synergy that produces a comfort level unique to each mattress… bottom line, your mattress will feel as supportive as it did on the first day.
products.description_html:
Our most popular ultra-premium all-foam constructed futon that is soft, plush, and cushy, yet is very supportive.

 

Characteristics:

  • Comfort Level - An elite plush, soft feel

  • Durability - 10-12+ years, designed for everyday use

  • Thickness - A TRUE 8" (14" of overstuffed goods compressed to fit inside an 8" border)

  • Weight - Per full size, 45 pounds

  • Home Style Use - Sofa and Bed (please note if primary purpose is for a bed)

  • Frame Recommendations - Can be used on a bi-fold frame or a platform bed style frame

 

Construction:

1. A 100% polyester fabric that breathes, stays cool and comfortable, and repels moisture.

2. 10" of high quality 2-pound density convoluted and flat foam provides the soft cushy feel of Otis Bed’s most popular futon mattress.

3. The flame-retardant rayon wrap protects the mattress and gives a clean finished look.

4. Machine tufting reduces the thickness of the mattress to lock in its good look and feel.

5. The tape edge construction ensures a proper fit and finish of the mattress cover.

 

Bench Built: Hand-made quality assures uniformity and quality control on each futon.


Box Edges: For a TRUE reading of thickness.


Overstuffed: Generous amounts (approx. 14") of different combinations of highly resilient foam and fiber that create an "inside out" force against the mattress ticking that is necessary for proper and comfortable support, whether sitting or sleeping.


Tape Edge Closure: Expert mattress tailoring operation that seals the comfort inside the mattress ensures proper placement of materials in the cover and reinforces the edges to present a clean tailored look instead of a "haphazardly stuffed look."


Compression Lace Tufting: This customized process alone will differentiate an Otis futon from any other! CLT serves to compress, strengthen, and control the overstuffed cushioning materials. The "buttonless" tufting process forces the foam, fibers, springs, and mattress fabric to work together to create a supportive synergy that produces a comfort level unique to each mattress… bottom line, your mattress will feel as supportive as it did on the first day.

products.name: Murphy Express Cabinet Bed
products.description_text: Introducing the Murphy Express, the ultimate space-saving solution that seamlessly combines functionality and style. Crafted from the finest solid rubber wood, this exquisite cabinet bed requires no assembly and effortlessly transforms from an elegant cabinet to a luxurious queen-size bed in under 60 seconds. Embrace the richness of the Wildwood Brown finish, showcasing the beauty of handpicked wood with a unique rustic grain. Each piece is distinct, adding depth and individuality to your living space. With premium quality, quick and easy conversion, and tailored elegance, the Murphy Cabinet Express is the perfect addition to apartments, guest rooms, or any space where versatility matters, elevating your interior decor with timeless sophistication. Available in twin, full, and queen sizes.Available in three finishes: Wildwood Brown, Normandy, and Provence. Features		No Assembly Required.			Built to last with durable hardwood construction.			Enjoy ultimate comfort with an included plush memory foam mattress.			Customize your ambiance with dimmable LED lamps.			Stay connected with built-in USB and AC outlets.
products.description_html:
Introducing the Murphy Express, the ultimate space-saving solution that seamlessly combines functionality and style. Crafted from the finest solid rubber wood, this exquisite cabinet bed requires no assembly and effortlessly transforms from an elegant cabinet to a luxurious queen-size bed in under 60 seconds. Embrace the richness of the Wildwood Brown finish, showcasing the beauty of handpicked wood with a unique rustic grain. Each piece is distinct, adding depth and individuality to your living space. With premium quality, quick and easy conversion, and tailored elegance, the Murphy Cabinet Express is the perfect addition to apartments, guest rooms, or any space where versatility matters, elevating your interior decor with timeless sophistication.

 

Available in twin, full, and queen sizes.

Available in three finishes: Wildwood Brown, Normandy, and Provence.

 

Features

  • No Assembly Required.

  • Built to last with durable hardwood construction.

  • Enjoy ultimate comfort with an included plush memory foam mattress.

  • Customize your ambiance with dimmable LED lamps.

  • Stay connected with built-in USB and AC outlets.

products.name: Sealy San Sebastian Cabinet Bed
products.description_text: Night & Day Furniture's newest cabinet bed, fully assembled and easy-to-convert! The Sealy San Sebastian Cabinet Bed features elegant acacia cabinet construction, solid hardwood build, and a space-saving design that transforms into a sideboard or TV stand when closed. This fully assembled cabinet bed includes a Sealy Posturepedic mattress with pressure-relieving memory foam for ultimate comfort and support. The soft knit fabric cover is easy to clean, ensuring long-lasting use.Available in Twin, Full, and Queen sizes in Espresso and White finishesTwin: 45.3W x 19.7D x 49.6HFull: 63.3W x 19.7D x 49.6HQueen: 69.3W x 19.7D x 49.6H
products.description_html:
Night & Day Furniture's newest cabinet bed, fully assembled and easy-to-convert! The Sealy San Sebastian Cabinet Bed features elegant acacia cabinet construction, solid hardwood build, and a space-saving design that transforms into a sideboard or TV stand when closed. This fully assembled cabinet bed includes a Sealy Posturepedic mattress with pressure-relieving memory foam for ultimate comfort and support. The soft knit fabric cover is easy to clean, ensuring long-lasting use.

Available in Twin, Full, and Queen sizes in Espresso and White finishes

Twin: 45.3W x 19.7D x 49.6H

Full: 63.3W x 19.7D x 49.6H

Queen: 69.3W x 19.7D x 49.6H

products.name: Ranchero  Murphy Cabinet Bed
products.description_text: The newest addition to the Night & Day Murphy Cabinet Bed Line, the Ranchero Murphy Cabinet Bed has a rustic distressed finish with handsome antique brass hardware. Available in two finishes: Wildwood Brown and Wildwood Vintage White. Features include:	Higher sleep platform	Built-in dual power/USB module	Comes complete with flip-up side trays	Solid hardwood construction	Shallow sleep enclosure	Tri-fold premium 6-inch gel-infused  memory foam Queen mattress 	Large rolling storage drawer
products.description_html:
The newest addition to the Night & Day Murphy Cabinet Bed Line, the Ranchero Murphy Cabinet Bed has a rustic distressed finish with handsome antique brass hardware. Available in two finishes: Wildwood Brown and Wildwood Vintage White. 

Features include:

  • Higher sleep platform
  • Built-in dual power/USB module
  • Comes complete with flip-up side trays
  • Solid hardwood construction
  • Shallow sleep enclosure
  • Tri-fold premium 6-inch gel-infused  memory foam Queen mattress 
  • Large rolling storage drawer

products.name: Orion Murphy Cabinet Bed
products.description_text: Night and Day's newest Murphy Cabinet Bed, available in twin and full. Easy and safe design with metal latches, fold-out legs, and safety buckle design. Includes a 4” gel-infused memory foam tri-fold mattress.
products.description_html: Night and Day's newest Murphy Cabinet Bed, available in twin and full. Easy and safe design with metal latches, fold-out legs, and safety buckle design. Includes a 4” gel-infused memory foam tri-fold mattress.

products.name: Northern Exposure Log Futon
products.description_text: Constructed of Norway pine, the arms on this log futon are heavy six-inch diameter clean peeled logs that use mortise and tenon construction to show the authentic log character of the futon. Each piece has its own unique charm as no two trees grow the same. Available in Clear or Honey Pine Finish. Full: 85"L x 36"D x 32"HQueen: 90"L x 36"D x 36"H
products.description_html:
Constructed of Norway pine, the arms on this log futon are heavy six-inch diameter clean peeled logs that use mortise and tenon construction to show the authentic log character of the futon. Each piece has its own unique charm as no two trees grow the same. Available in Clear or Honey Pine Finish.

 

Full: 85"L x 36"D x 32"H

Queen: 90"L x 36"D x 36"H

products.name: Wilderness Log Futon
products.description_text: Constructed of Norway pine, this log futon is skip peeled, which means a little bit of cambium or bark is still on the log, giving it a more rustic or natural log look. Each log has to be hand selected to be just the right diameter and have the right character. The knots on the logs are pronounced or sticking out, which are called character knots. Available in Clear FInish. Full: 85"L x 36"D x 32"HQueen: 90"L x 36"D x 36"H
products.description_html:
Constructed of Norway pine, this log futon is skip peeled, which means a little bit of cambium or bark is still on the log, giving it a more rustic or natural log look. Each log has to be hand selected to be just the right diameter and have the right character. The knots on the logs are pronounced or sticking out, which are called character knots. Available in Clear FInish.

 

Full: 85"L x 36"D x 32"H

Queen: 90"L x 36"D x 36"H

products.name: Leg length options for Nomad Platform Bed
products.description_text: The Nomad Platform Beds come with a set of 15" legs which give a platform height of 15".  We also offer these sets of 12" legs or 18" legs for purchase which can be used instead of the 15" legs.  The 12" legs will give you a lower profile, but please note that the Rolling Drawers are NOT compatible with this option. The 18" legs are a good option if you are trying to create more clearance for a thicker mattress on the Trundle Bed - the 18" legs will allow for a mattress that is up to 10" thick for the trundle. The King size option will come with the 2 center legs required for the King size Nomad.

The 18" legs are a good option if you are trying to create more clearance for a thicker mattress on the Trundle Bed - the 18" legs will allow for a mattress that is up to 10" thick for the trundle.

products.description_text: The Folding Platform Bed is stylish, convenient, and can be folded in half for convenient storage.  Its low design, with legs that are tucked underneath, gives the appearance of a floating bed.

products.name: Nomad
products.description_text: The Nomad Platform Bed is considered a minimalist Swedish design with an emphasis on functionality and simple, clean lines. This bed frame features a slat spacing of 2.8 inches to accommodate the requirements of just about any mattress on the market today. The Nomad has a weight capacity of up to 600 pounds and a platform height of 15 inches.
products.description_html: The Nomad Platform Bed is considered a minimalist Swedish design with an emphasis on functionality and simple, clean lines. This bed frame features a slat spacing of 2.8 inches to accommodate the requirements of just about any mattress on the market today. The Nomad has a weight capacity of up to 600 pounds and a platform height of 15 inches.

products.name: Lexington
products.description_text: The horizontal lines of this bed offer a sense of tranquility in your room. The Lexington has a slat spacing of 2.8" to accommodate the requirements of just about any mattress on the market today, a weight capacity of up to 600 pounds, and a platform height of 15 inches which can accommodate the Trundle or Rolling Drawers underneath.
products.description_html: The horizontal lines of this bed offer a sense of tranquility in your room. The Lexington has a slat spacing of 2.8" to accommodate the requirements of just about any mattress on the market today, a weight capacity of up to 600 pounds, and a platform height of 15 inches which can accommodate the Trundle or Rolling Drawers underneath.

products.name: Charleston
products.description_text: The Charleston Platform Bed provides a classic and clean mission-style headboard. With a slat spacing of 2.8 inches, the Charleston can accommodate just about any mattress on the market today and has a weight capacity of up to 600 pounds. This bed features a 40" tall headboard, slats flush with the tops of the rails, and has a platform height of 15 inches that can accommodate the KD Frames Trundle or Rolling Drawers underneath.
products.description_html: The Charleston Platform Bed provides a classic and clean mission-style headboard. products.name: Ekko Platform Bed
products.description_text: The Ekko Platform Bed adds a clean and modern touch to your bedroom with its "floating bed" appearance. This bed frame features a slat spacing of 3 inches or less and a platform height of 10 inches.  The Ekko has a weight capacity of up to 600 pounds.

products.name: Pagoda
products.description_text: Pagoda will be the centerpiece of your room, with its distinct and elegant, slightly curved arm cap. Available in Black Walnut and Gray. Available in Full, Queen, Full Loveseat w/Ottoman, and Queen Loveseat w/Ottoman.

products.name: Yuma
products.description_text: The Yuma is a Dual-Comfort linked coil innerspring unit, with the full size having 390 coils and queen size having 493 coils, with 2" of 2 lbs. flat polyurethane soft foam, 3" of 2.2 lbs. of convoluted polyurethane foam, and 1.375" flat 2.2 lbs. of firm foam.

products.name: Mattress Protector
products.description_text: Protect It™ Futon Protectors New protective technology makes Protect It™ the ultimate mattress protector.The waterproof, breathable, anti-allergen, dust mite barrier is laminated between two layers of smooth, durable 100% polyester fabric for ultimate performance and comfort.	Waterproof	Breathable	Quiet	Blocks allergens and dust mites	Washing won’t weaken the barrier	10 Year Product Limited WarrantyAvailable in Twin (6″ loft), Full (7″ loft), and Queen (7″ loft) sizes.
products.description_html:
Protect It™ Futon Protectors

 

New protective technology makes Protect It™ the ultimate mattress protector.

The waterproof, breathable, anti-allergen, dust mite barrier is laminated between two layers of smooth, durable 100% polyester fabric for ultimate performance and comfort.

  • Waterproof
  • Breathable
  • Quiet
  • Blocks allergens and dust mites
  • Washing won’t weaken the barrier
  • 10 Year Product Limited Warranty

Available in Twin (6″ loft), Full (7″ loft), and Queen (7″ loft) sizes.

products.description_text: Galena is a new design, featuring subtle curves and thicker slats.  Available in Black Walnut and Dark Cherry. Available in four sizes: Full, Queen, Full Loveseat w/Ottoman, and Queen Loveseat w/Ottoman.

products.description_text: *Contact for availability and pricing* The  Mounainaire is definitely an overachiever! It combines 14 inches of high-density and convulated foams compressed into an 8" case. This mattress provides a supportive plush comfort while sitting and a supportive firmer feeling for sleeping comfort. The Mountainaire remains the most popular choice for both stages of use.

products.name: Mesa 5000
products.description_text: *Contact for availability and pricing* The Mesa 5000 is an ultra-firm platform bed mattress with 9" of firm high-quality convoluted two-pound foam, creating the firmest futon mattress in the Otis Bedline. Two layers of polyester fiber batting allows the mattress to give "just a little."
products.description_html:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

 

The Mesa 5000 is an ultra-firm platform bed mattress with 9" of firm high-quality convoluted two-pound foam, creating the firmest futon mattress in the Otis Bedline. Two layers of polyester fiber batting allows the mattress to give "just a little."

products.name: Mesa 3000
products.description_text: *Contact for availability and pricing* The Mesa 3000 has the same long-lasting support of the Mesa 1000 but with a firmer feel. Although the Mesa 3000 is very firm, it has just enough flexibility to allow for use on a bi-fold frame.
products.description_html:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

 

The Mesa 3000 has the same long-lasting support of the Mesa 1000 but with a firmer feel. Although the Mesa 3000 is very firm, it has just enough flexibility to allow for use on a bi-fold frame.

products.name: Mesa 1000
products.description_text: *Contact for availability and pricing* Generous amounts (approx. 14″) of different combinations of highly-resilient foam and polyester fiber batting compressed to an 8” thickness creates dense yet soft support, whether sitting or sleeping. The Mesa 1000 can be used on a bi-fold frame or a platform bed style frame.
products.description_html:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

 

Generous amounts (approx. 14″) of different combinations of highly-resilient foam and polyester fiber batting compressed to an 8” thickness creates dense yet soft support, whether sitting or sleeping. The Mesa 1000 can be used on a bi-fold frame or a platform bed style frame.

products.name: Maricopa
products.description_text: *Contact for availability and pricing* The unique soft touch on one side with firm support on the other makes the Maricopa one of our most popular Dual Comfort mattresses.
products.description_html:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

 

The unique soft touch on one side with firm support on the other makes the Maricopa one of our most popular Dual Comfort mattresses.

products.name: Gemini II
products.description_text: *Contact for availability and pricing* The Gemini provides the comforting support of latex-like foam to deliver exceptional comfort that envelops your entire body. Ultra-premium seating comfort; unmatchable sleeping comfort.
products.description_html:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

 

The Gemini provides the comforting support of latex-like foam to deliver exceptional comfort that envelops your entire body. Ultra-premium seating comfort; unmatchable sleeping comfort.

products.name: Flagstaff
products.description_text: *Contact for availability and pricing* The Flagstaff is a perfect blend of 9” of both soft and medium firm high-density convoluted foam plus 2” of 2.5-pound density block foam compressed to 8” to create a nearly perfect “medium” feel.
products.description_html:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

 

The Flagstaff is a perfect blend of 9” of both soft and medium firm high-density convoluted foam plus 2” of 2.5-pound density block foam compressed to 8” to create a nearly perfect “medium” feel.

products.name: Chandler
products.description_text: *Contact for availability and pricing* The Chandler is a pressure-relieving memory foam mattress that conforms to and supports for individualized comfort.
products.description_html:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

 

The Chandler is a pressure-relieving memory foam mattress that conforms to and supports for individualized comfort.

products.name: Asheville
products.description_text: *Contact for availability and pricing* Although a spring system isn’t needed for support in this high-performance futon mattress, the Asheville offers familiar comfort for those who prefer the feel of an innerspring mattress.
products.description_html:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

 

Although a spring system isn’t needed for support in this high-performance futon mattress, the Asheville offers familiar comfort for those who prefer the feel of an innerspring mattress.

products.name: Alpine
products.description_text: *Contact for availability and pricing* The Alpine is a dual comfort mattress, overstuffed with 12” of  high-density foams thermally rebonded for extra strength and poly batting compressed to an 8” thickness. The Alpine is a customer favorite for its comfort and affordability.
products.description_html:
*Contact for availability and pricing*

 

The Alpine is a dual comfort mattress, overstuffed with 12” of  high-density foams thermally rebonded for extra strength and poly batting compressed to an 8” thickness. The Alpine is a customer favorite for its comfort and affordability.

products.name: Center Legs
products.description_text: Two 11", 14", or 17" center support legs and 8 wood screws. Use the 11" center legs with the 12" optional leg height.  Use the 14" center legs for the standard 15" platform height.  Use the 17" center legs with the 18" optional leg height. These legs can be used to lend extra support to the outside rails of all sizes and/or the middle rails of the full and queen sizes of the Nomad, Charleston, or Lexington platform beds. Please note that the king size Nomad comes with this set of center support legs for the middle two rails.  These support legs are only needed if you plan to exceed the 600 pound weight limit of the Nomad, Charleston or Lexington bed frames.
products.description_html:
Two 11", 14", or 17" center support legs and 8 wood screws. 

Use the 11" center legs with the 12" optional leg height.  Use the 14" center legs for the standard 15" platform height.  Use the 17" center legs with the 18" optional leg height.

 

These legs can be used to lend extra support to the outside rails of all sizes and/or the middle rails of the full and queen sizes of the Nomad, Charleston, or Lexington platform beds. Please note that the king size Nomad comes with this set of center support legs for the middle two rails.  These support legs are only needed if you plan to exceed the 600 pound weight limit of the Nomad, Charleston or Lexington bed frames.

products.name: Twin Trundle Bed
products.description_text: The Twin Trundle has a slat spacing of 2.8 inches and is a perfect solution for extra bed space without taking up extra room. Equipped with four sturdy wheel for easy gliding and a weight limit of 400 pounds, this bed is designed to fit under all sizes, except for the King Nomad which comes with center legs.
products.description_html: The Twin Trundle has a slat spacing of 2.8 inches and is a perfect solution for extra bed space without taking up extra room. Equipped with four sturdy wheel for easy gliding and a weight limit of 400 pounds, this bed is designed to fit under all sizes, except for the King Nomad which comes with center legs.

products.name: Rolling Drawers
products.description_text: The Rolling Drawers fit neatly under the Nomad, Charleston, and Lexington platform beds.  Two drawers come in the set and each drawer is equipped with four sturdy wheels for easy gliding. Please note that the Rolling Drawers have a slatted bottom. The Rolling Drawers are NOT compatible with the 12" leg length option for the Nomad, Charleston, and Lexington.

products.name: Studio Frame
products.description_text: The Studio frame is a no-frills approach for a couch that can quickly and effortlessly be converted to a bed. It features four adjustable positions as a couch, with a set of sturdy wheels in the back, making it easy to move. Simple and affordable, this frame is a popular choice for any casual setting that fits in with any urban decor. The sturdy wheels in the back make it easy to move, with four reclining positions available. The Studio frame is a popular choice for any casual setting. Available in Full and Queen sizes. DimensionsFull Size: 54.5"W x 74"L x 10"H (bed position)Sofa Height: 31"Sofa Depth: 37.5" Queen Size: 59.5"W x 78"L x 10"H (bed position)Sofa Height: 36"Sofa Depth: 38"
products.description_html:
The Studio frame is a no-frills approach for a couch that can quickly and effortlessly be converted to a bed. It features four adjustable positions as a couch, with a set of sturdy wheels in the back, making it easy to move. Simple and affordable, this frame is a popular choice for any casual setting that fits in with any urban decor. The sturdy wheels in the back make it easy to move, with four reclining positions available. The Studio frame is a popular choice for any casual setting. Available in Full and Queen sizes.

 

Dimensions

Full Size: 54.5"W x 74"L x 10"H (bed position)

Sofa Height: 31"

Sofa Depth: 37.5"

 

Queen Size: 59.5"W x 78"L x 10"H (bed position)

Sofa Height: 36"

Sofa Depth: 38"

products.name: KD Lounger
products.description_text: The KD Lounger frame is a lounger, chair, and bed all in one! This multi-functional solid wood frame features numerous convertible positions and rounded corners, which is both functionally and aesthetically pleasing. This Lounger will be a sturdy fixture in your home for years to come. Popular uses for this versatile frame in all its multiple positions includereading, gaming, as well as watching sports and TV. This Lounger also makes a great transitional bed for small children: You can even adjust the back to your favorite position and read your child to sleep at night.Available in Twin, Full & Queen sizes. DimensionsTwin Size: 37"W x 74"L x 10" H (bed position)Full Size:  52"W x 74"L x 10" H (bed position)Queen Size: 58"W x 79"L x 10" H (bed position) Sofa Height:  Twin 31.5"; Full 31.5"; Queen 36.5"Sofa Depth (extension underneath frame): 46" (all sizes)Overall Lounger Depth (w/extension): 63" (all sizes)
products.description_html:
The KD Lounger frame is a lounger, chair, and bed all in one! This multi-functional solid wood frame features numerous convertible positions and rounded corners, which is both functionally and aesthetically pleasing. This Lounger will be a sturdy fixture in your home for years to come. Popular uses for this versatile frame in all its multiple positions includereading, gaming, as well as watching sports and TV. This Lounger also makes a great transitional bed for small children: You can even adjust the back to your favorite position and read your child to sleep at night.

Available in Twin, Full & Queen sizes.

 

Dimensions

Twin Size: 37"W x 74"L x 10" H (bed position)

Full Size:  52"W x 74"L x 10" H (bed position)

Queen Size: 58"W x 79"L x 10" H (bed position)

 

Sofa Height:  Twin 31.5"; Full 31.5"; Queen 36.5"

Sofa Depth (extension underneath frame): 46" (all sizes)

Overall Lounger Depth (w/extension): 63" (all sizes)

products.name: Denali
products.description_text: This mid-century modern style frame, with slightly-rounded wooden slats and sleek finishes, is designed to be both functional and fashionable anywhere you put it.  The Denali is available in Warm Cherry, Dark Cherry, Gray & Natural. Available in Full, Queen, Full Loveseat w/Ottoman, and Queen Loveseat w/Ottoman.
products.description_html:
This mid-century modern style frame, with slightly-rounded wooden slats and sleek finishes, is designed to be both functional and fashionable anywhere you put it. 

 

The Denali is available in Warm Cherry, Dark Cherry, Gray & Natural. Available in Full, Queen, Full Loveseat w/Ottoman, and Queen Loveseat w/Ottoman.

products.name: Dillon
products.description_text: Designed to optimize space even further, the Dillon's armless style allows for the cushion to be the statement piece. Available in Warm Cherry, Dark Cherry, Black Walnut, Natural. and Gray. Available in Painted Black and Natural in Full and Queen Size only. Available in Full, Queen, Full Loveseat w/Ottoman, and Queen Loveseat w/Ottoman.

products.name: Rockwell

products.description_text: The Tiro frame is the easiest way to make the most out of small spaces, with its collapsible tray table feature. Available in your choice of Warm Cherry or Dark Cherry. Available in Full, Queen, Full Loveseat w/Ottoman, and Queen Loveseat w/Ottoman.

products.name: Tozi
products.description_text: The Tozi is a low-profile futon frame that fits great in tight spaces and allows the cover to be the focal point of this design.  Available in Black Walnut in Full, Queen, Full Loveseat + Ottoman, and Queen Loveseat + Ottoman sizes.
